---
title: "Template Title"
author: "Your Name"
date: "The Date"
output: output_format
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

standard libraries used 
```{r}
library(tidyverse) # a package of packages like dplyR, and other essential packages 
library(here) # a short cut for the working directory
library(utHelpR) # a homegrown package with helper functions 
```

libraries for bringing data into a project
```{r}
library(readr) # reads rectangle data
library(readxl) # reads excel data
library(openxlsx) # works with Excel projects 
library(googlesheets4) # works with Google sheets
library(utDataStoR) # brings in standardized sql scripts
library(janitor) # cleans data from a file to fit R standards
```

libraries for data manipulation
```{r}
library(stringr) # manipulate strings 
library(rlang) # manipulate objects to and from variables 
library(scales) # helps with rates and scales
library(lubridate) # helps with dates
library(purrr) # allows iterations with list
```

libraries for presenting data
```{r}
# libraries for presenting data
library(shiny) # makes shiny applications  
library(gt) # makes tables
library(DT) # makes tables
library(kableExtra) # makes html tables 
library(ggplot2) # makes graphs and charts
```

libraries used for development
 library(usethis) 
 library(devtools) 
 library(gitcreds)
